sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105288" key="trisullabi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρι-συλλᾰβία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n105288.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compass of three syllables,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὐχ ὑπερβαίνει τὴν τ.</foreign> Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.137" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.137</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
